# `SelectPromptConfig`

Single-selection prompt — maps to `enum` flags or any flag with choices. Part of PromptConfig.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: interface
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/prompt.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/prompt.ts:55`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/prompt.ts#L55)

## Signatures

```ts
interface SelectPromptConfig extends PromptConfigBase {}
```

## Members

### Properties

#### `choices`

Available choices. When omitted for `enum` flags, the enum values
from the flag schema are used automatically.

```ts
choices?: readonly SelectChoice[];
```

#### `kind`

Discriminator identifying this as a single-selection prompt.

```ts
kind: 'select';
```

#### `message`

The question displayed to the user.

```ts
message: string;
```
